content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead, with the car well-centered on the straight portion transitioning into the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 16 + 5 = 21
Waypoint 21: (6.204955, 0.686169)
Car position: (5.333606, 0.661080)
Bearing = atan2(0.686169 - 0.661080, 6.204955 - 5.333606) = atan2(0.025089, 0.871349) ≈ 1.65°
Delta = 1.65 - (-1.003) = 2.65° → nearly straight, tiny left bias, no correction needed
